prompt: write a post-mortem for the ShopifyPriceSyncAdapter startup failure we just fixed — the app crashed on startup with local profile because ExternalApiConfig was profile-gated but ShopifyPriceSyncAdapter still depended on shopifyRestClient

assertions.name: has_all_sections
assertions.description: Contains sections: Summary, Timeline, Symptom, Root Cause, Fix Applied, Impact, Lessons Learned, Prevention

assertions.name: has_severity
assertions.description: Includes a severity rating (Critical, High, Medium, or Low)

assertions.name: has_prevention_checkboxes
assertions.description: Prevention section has at least one '- [ ]' action item

assertions.name: mentions_exception
assertions.description: Root cause mentions UnsatisfiedDependencyException or bean not found error

assertions.name: names_key_files
assertions.description: Names ExternalApiConfig and ShopifyPriceSyncAdapter in root cause or fix

assertions.name: explains_profile_mismatch
assertions.description: Explains that the RestClient bean was profile-gated but the consumer was not
